channel.title: NRIBeat — Daily Pulse for Indian Americans
channel.description: Immigration, AI, Cricket, Bollywood, and Layoffs — curated daily for the Indian-American community.

item.title: Seema Sajdeh The Traitors Season 2 India 2026
item.description: Seema Sajdeh from Fabulous Lives of Bollywood Wives is being considered for The Traitors India Season 2, Netflix's hit reality psychological thriller format. The show, which begins filming later in 2026, is expected to premiere in late 2026 and will stream globally on Netflix—making it accessible to Indian diaspora viewers across the US.

item.title: Kleiner Perkins $3.5B AI Fund: What It Means for Your Tech Career [2026]
item.description: Kleiner Perkins' $3.5B AI fund signals a massive hiring surge for AI-skilled engineers starting mid-2026. Machine learning salaries are about to rise, and ChatGPT alternatives will compete for dominance. Indian engineers should start learning Claude and Llama now—skills in these tools become job-market essentials.

item.title: Drone Tech for Police: Game-Changer for Public Safety Jobs [2026]
item.description: Brinc launched a 911 drone to replace police helicopters, creating immediate demand for ML, robotics, and backend engineers. Indian tech professionals can pivot into this high-pay public safety sector ($140K–$240K for mid-senior roles) by building drone + ML projects now. This is one of the few AI growth areas not threatened by ChatGPT alternatives.

item.title: Coney & Tiffen NZC Hall of Fame 2026: Cricket Legends Honored
item.description: New Zealand cricket icons Coney and Tiffen have been inducted into the prestigious NZC Hall of Fame, with their formal ceremony happening at the New Zealand Cricket Awards. For Indian cricket fans in the US, this honor highlights how cricket's greatest achievements transcend borders, reminding us that excellence in the sport comes from every nation and era.

item.title: RCB Sold for $1.78B: What It Means for IPL 2025 & India Cricket
item.description: Royal Challengers Bangalore has been sold to a consortium of Aditya Birla Group and Times of India for $1.78 billion—the largest IPL franchise valuation ever. The deal explicitly includes both men's and women's teams, signaling major investment in women's cricket and suggesting expanded media coverage for US-based Indian cricket fans in IPL 2025.

item.title: Spencer Johnson Replaces Ellis at CSK for IPL 2025 Season
item.description: Spencer Johnson, Australian pace bowler, replaces injured Ellis at CSK for IPL 2025's final stages (arriving late April). After a year-long back injury absence, Johnson's comeback carries both tactical advantage (left-arm pace) and fitness questions for the reigning champions' playoff push.

item.title: March 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Retrogresses to September 15, 2013
item.description: March 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date retrogresses 303 days to September 15, 2013; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 November 01, 2014, EB-3 August 15, 2014. Retrogression this month — check with your attorney if your date was previously current.

item.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Jumps +304 Days to Jul 15, 2014
item.description: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date jumps +304 days to July 15, 2014. EB-3 India holds at November 15, 2013. DFF authorized — EB-2 & EB-3 Dates for Filing both advance to January 15, 2015.

item.title: Khana Dil Se: Hansal Mehta's AI Culinary Series 2025
item.description: Hansal Mehta's groundbreaking AI-led culinary series Khana Dil Se launches in 2025, merging India's food heritage with artificial intelligence. It's streaming availability is pending official announcement, likely on Netflix or Disney+ Hotstar for US diaspora audiences.

item.title: India Cricket Squad 2026: Kashvee Gautam & Anushka Sharma picked for South Africa T20I tour
item.description: India's women's cricket team has selected newcomers Kashvee Gautam and Anushka Sharma for the South Africa T20I tour, marking an exciting generational shift. The squad drops experienced players like Amanjot Kaur, signaling selectors' commitment to building future-focused talent. US-based Indian cricket fans should start tracking these rising stars—they could shape India's women's cricket for years to come.

item.title: Alaya F Addresses Cosmetic Surgery Rumors After Fashion Week 2026
item.description: Alaya F denied cosmetic surgery rumors after her Lakmé Fashion Week appearance, crediting her look to professional makeup and styling. The incident highlights ongoing beauty standard discussions in Bollywood as the industry continues evolving in 2025-2026.

item.title: Payne Replaces Edwards at Sunrisers Hyderabad IPL 2026
item.description: Sunrisers Hyderabad has signed England's Will Payne (35) to replace Reece Edwards for IPL 2026, banking on Payne's recent ILT20 and BBL championship wins. For Indian cricket fans in the US, this is a strategic move showing franchises prioritize experience in T20 cricket. Expect SRH to be contenders next season with this bowling addition.

item.title: AI Tools for Building Energy Optimization: 2026 Guide
item.description: AI-driven building energy optimization is a growing, policy-backed field offering Indian tech professionals competitive salaries, long-term stability, and clearer visa pathways than consumer AI roles. Learning the domain takes 2–3 months; entry points exist for ML engineers, data engineers, and backend developers. Unlike ChatGPT alternatives, this space has sustained 10+ year demand from regulatory compliance and climate targets.

item.title: What Bernie Sanders' AI Video Reveals About Chatbot Limitations
item.description: A recent viral video attempting to expose AI system behavior actually revealed how chatbots are designed to be agreeable—a critical insight for tech professionals. For Indian engineers working on AI products, understanding prompt engineering, AI safety testing, and behavioral design is now essential career knowledge that employers actively hire for.

item.title: Zipline's $200M Funding: What Drone Delivery Means for Your Tech Career
item.description: Zipline's $200M funding validates drone delivery as a major growth sector, creating significant hiring opportunities for Indian tech professionals in AI, cloud infrastructure, and robotics. This is a genuine career opportunity with competitive US-level salaries, especially for engineers with skills in machine learning, DevOps, and autonomous systems.

item.title: Banijay Asia Brings Dutch Reality Hit 'The Alliance' to Prime Video India
James Harris Retires: Welsh Seamer Ends 19-Year Cricket Journey
England's Test Cricket Priorities: Australia & India Rivalry Heats Up
KKR Gambles on Saurabh Dubey as Akash Deep Sidelined
What Bernie Sanders' AI Video Reveals About Chatbot Limitations
